channel.title: Openshift on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Openshift on Validated Patterns

item.title: Can't Patch Fast Enough? Zero Trust as a Last Line of Defense
item.description: Network policies in the Layered Zero Trust Validated Pattern provide containment when vulnerabilities are discovered faster than patches can be applied. This post introduces the approach and links to the full Red Hat blog article.

item.title: Using subdomain in your OpenShift route definitions
item.description: When to use subdomain when defining a Route in OpenShift
